creator: darkness_souls@hotmail.co.uk
text:
Hey,

Actually my problem isnt exactly based on freebsd, lemme describe it,

I have a freebsd server, using virtualbox to connect to it, so my problem is ive accidentally deleted the .SAV file of the virtualbox that saves the freebsd sessions, so im wondering if you can help me making a new .SAV file for my freebsd? Reply me back please
